user.title: NetDaemon Toolkit
user.description:
Folder to edit. For the log view, bind-mount NetDaemon's own Docker log file read-only into Home Assistant and enter that mount target below (see README) — everything else works without it.

**After finishing this form:** if this is the first time NetDaemon Toolkit is set up against this folder, restart NetDaemon once yourself (Docker, the add-on, however you normally do it) — not from the panel. That first restart is what starts the reload/status/codegen apps this integration just installed; the panel's own reload button only works after that.

data.console_log: Console log file path (optional, for the log view)
data.webhook_relays: Webhook relays (optional, one per line: webhook_id:event_type)

reconfigure.title: NetDaemon Toolkit
reconfigure.description:
Folder to edit. For the log view, bind-mount NetDaemon's own Docker log file read-only into Home Assistant and enter that mount target below (see README) — everything else works without it.

If you're pointing this at a new/different folder that has never run these apps before, restart NetDaemon once yourself after saving — see the note in the initial setup step.

data.console_log: Console log file path (optional, for the log view)
data.webhook_relays: Webhook relays (optional, one per line: webhook_id:event_type)

abort.already_configured: NetDaemon Toolkit is already set up.
